name: Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs until thick.
2. Gradually add sugar and continue beating.
3. Add margarine and beat again.
4. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
5. Gradually add this dry mixture to the egg mixture with honey and coffee, stirring until combined.
6. Stir in the mashed banana.
7. Grease a tube pan or two 9-inch loaf pans with oil and flour.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
11. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
WARNING: Honey Cake has 1 teaspoon of sugar per serving.
